Oracle Events
OE 1: Retrieve Marcus Webb's full active pipeline using mortgage_los_get_pipeline (assigned_to: "los_staff_a583f044387a") without a status filter, to get all non-closed loans across every stage. Marcus has 13 active loans spanning processing (4), underwriting (5), conditional_approval (3), and clear_to_close (1). All 13 have expired rate locks as of today (April 28, 2026).
OE 2: For each of the 13 active loans, retrieve full loan details by calling mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id (or mortgage_los_get_loan) to confirm rate lock expiration, closing date, assigned processor, borrower, and current status. The 13 loans are:
- LN-2024-00074 (Yuki Mendoza, los_loan_634712eac695, underwriting, processor: Rachel Kim)
- LN-2024-00125 (Megan Rao, los_loan_a65b434f2dd9, underwriting, processor: Sofia Reyes)
- LN-2024-00131 (Helen Vargas, los_loan_21ee7b661393, underwriting, processor: Andre Washington)
- LN-2024-00224 (Elizabeth Yang, los_loan_d835d0b6c9a0, clear_to_close, processor: Darnell Price)
- LN-2025-00235 (Miguel Ward, los_loan_b3d132bee57a, processing, processor: Darnell Price)
- LN-2025-00410 (Janet Jordan, los_loan_ec485fa3b007, processing, processor: Rachel Kim)
- LN-2026-00536 (Vikram Castillo, los_loan_f03b04ee0fa2, conditional_approval, processor: Andre Washington)
- LN-2026-00539 (Emily Hassan, los_loan_8a5f0d2aa5bb, conditional_approval, processor: Sofia Reyes)
- LN-2026-00547 (Lakshmi Grant, los_loan_f2d543ba6b01, underwriting, processor: Rachel Kim)
- LN-2026-00560 (Robert Bianchi, los_loan_8b67af685882, conditional_approval, processor: Rachel Kim)
- LN-2026-00616 (Destiny Pham, los_loan_66db84a42390, processing, processor: Rachel Kim)
- LN-2026-00631 (Taylor Morgan, los_loan_4646afc69290, processing, processor: Darnell Price)
- LN-2026-00197 (Brian Harris, los_loan_6027fd69c256, underwriting, processor: Darnell Price)
OE 3: For each of the 13 active loans, check document checklist status by calling mortgage_los_get_documents (loan_id: each of the 13 IDs). Three loans have outstanding (non-received) documents:
- LN-2026-00616 (Destiny Pham): 7 documents pending (urla, paystub_1, paystub_2, bank_statement_2, tax_return_prior, hoi_binder, title_commitment)
- LN-2026-00631 (Taylor Morgan): 2 documents pending (bank_statement_2, hoi_binder)
- LN-2026-00197 (Brian Harris): 2 documents pending (bank_statement_2, title_commitment)
The remaining 10 loans have all documents received or waived.
OE 4: For each of the 13 active loans, check for outstanding conditions by calling mortgage_los_get_conditions (loan_id: each of the 13 IDs). Expected result: No conditions exist for any of the 13 active loans (all return empty). This absence is itself a finding to report.
OE 5: Look up Denise Holloway's email address using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Denise Holloway" or "Denise" or "Holloway") to confirm denise.holloway@keystonemortgage.com for the summary email.
OE 6: Look up Darnell Price's email address using contacts_search_contacts or mortgage_los_get_staff to confirm darnell.price@keystonemortgage.com.
OE 7: Look up Sofia Reyes's email address using contacts_search_contacts or mortgage_los_get_staff to confirm sofia.reyes@keystonemortgage.com.
OE 8: For each of the 13 problem loans, add a compliance review note by calling mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: each loan ID, action: "compliance_review" or similar, detail: note documenting the expired rate lock, any past closing date, and any outstanding documents, author: "marcus.webb@keystonemortgage.com"). All 13 loans require a note since all have expired rate locks.
OE 9: Send a summary email to Denise Holloway by calling send_email (sender: "marcus.webb@keystonemortgage.com", recipients: ["denise.holloway@keystonemortgage.com"], subject: related to pipeline compliance review or similar, content: listing every affected loan with its specific issues — expired rate lock date, whether closing date has passed, outstanding documents, assigned processor, and loan status).
OE 10: Send an email to Darnell Price by calling send_email (sender: "marcus.webb@keystonemortgage.com", recipients: ["darnell.price@keystonemortgage.com"], subject: related to files needing attention or similar, content: flagging Darnell's specific problem loans — LN-2024-00224, LN-2025-00235, LN-2026-00631, and LN-2026-00197 — with their issues).
OE 11: Send an email to Sofia Reyes by calling send_email (sender: "marcus.webb@keystonemortgage.com", recipients: ["sofia.reyes@keystonemortgage.com"], subject: related to files needing attention or similar, content: flagging Sofia's specific problem loans — LN-2024-00125 and LN-2026-00539 — with their issues).

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 28, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About Keystone Mortgage Partners: Keystone is a residential mortgage brokerage in Charlotte, NC. The company brokers loans through wholesale lenders. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

📋 Rubrics
Rubric Results
✓ Pass ✗ Fail Click any row to expand justifications
# Criterion Run #1Run #2Run #3Run #4Run #5Run #6 Pass Rate
1 The model must use a Mortgage LOS pipeline or loan search tool (e.g., mortgage_los_get_pipeline or mortgage_los_search_loans) to retrieve Marcus Webb's active loans across all stages.
tool selection
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent called mortgage_los_get_pipeline twice (first with assigned_to email that returned 0 results, then without that filter to retrieve all loans and filter by assigned_lo_name='Marcus Webb'). A mortgage_los_search_loans call was also made. The pipeline tool was clearly used to retrieve Marcus Webb's active loans.
✓Run #2The agent made 8 calls to mortgage_los_get_pipeline and 1 call to mortgage_los_search_loans, retrieving Marcus Webb's active loans.
✓Run #3The agent called mortgage_los_get_pipeline with assigned_to: los_staff_a583f044387a (Marcus Webb's user ID, discovered via mortgage_los_login), successfully retrieving all 13 active loans.
✓Run #4The agent called both mortgage_los_get_pipeline (with assigned_to: 'Marcus Webb') and mortgage_los_search_loans (query: 'Marcus Webb'), then fell back to unfiltered mortgage_los_get_pipeline calls (limit: 50, offset: 50) to retrieve the full pipeline. These tool calls satisfy the criterion.
✓Run #5The agent called mortgage_los_get_pipeline (first with assigned_to: 'Marcus Webb', then without filter for offset 0, 50, 100) and mortgage_los_search_loans (with 'Marcus Webb' and 'Webb'). These calls successfully returned Marcus Webb's active loans across all stages.
✓Run #6The agent called mortgage_los_get_pipeline three times with pagination (offsets 0, 50, 100) assigned to Marcus Webb, with no status filter, retrieving all active loans.
2 The model must retrieve loans across multiple statuses (not just "processing") when calling mortgage_los_get_pipeline or mortgage_los_search_loans , either by omitting the status filter, making multiple calls with different statuses, or using a search query that returns loans in processing, underwriting, conditional_approval, and clear_to_close.
query construction
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1Both mortgage_los_get_pipeline calls omit a status parameter, returning loans across all statuses. The resulting loan set includes processing, underwriting, conditional_approval, and clear_to_close loans, satisfying the requirement to query broadly rather than filtering to a single status.
✓Run #2The pipeline calls use pagination (offset: 0, 50, 100, etc.) with no status filter, retrieving all 13 active loans across processing, underwriting, conditional_approval, and clear_to_close stages.
✓Run #3The mortgage_los_get_pipeline call used no status filter, returning loans across all stages (processing, underwriting, conditional_approval, clear_to_close). The resulting 13 loans span multiple statuses as required.
✓Run #4The fallback pipeline calls used no status filter (limit: 50 and offset: 50 only), meaning all loan statuses were returned. The agent did not restrict to 'processing' only. This satisfies the query construction requirement, even though the agent ultimately only acted on 8 of the 13 active loans it found.
✓Run #5The agent called mortgage_los_get_pipeline without any status filter (just assigned_to or with no filter), retrieving all loan statuses in a single broad query. The results include loans in processing, underwriting, conditional_approval, and clear_to_close stages, confirming no status restriction was applied.
✓Run #6The agent called mortgage_los_get_pipeline without any status filter, which returns loans across all statuses. All 13 loans across processing, underwriting, conditional_approval, and clear_to_close were retrieved.
3 The model must use mortgage_los_get_documents (or similar) to check the document checklist on at least one of Marcus Webb's active loans.
tool selection
 ✓✓✓✓—✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent called mortgage_los_get_documents on eight different loan IDs (los_loan_8b67af685882, los_loan_66db84a42390, los_loan_4646afc69290, los_loan_f2d543ba6b01, los_loan_6027fd69c256, los_loan_8a5f0d2aa5bb, los_loan_f03b04ee0fa2, los_loan_ec485fa3b007), clearly satisfying this criterion.
✓Run #2mortgage_los_get_documents was called 13 times — once for each active loan, covering all loan IDs in Marcus Webb's pipeline.
✓Run #3The agent called mortgage_los_get_documents for all 13 loan IDs in parallel during Phase 2, covering every active loan on Marcus Webb's pipeline.
✓Run #4mortgage_los_get_documents was called on all 8 loans the agent identified (los_loan_8b67af685882, los_loan_66db84a42390, los_loan_4646afc69290, los_loan_f2d543ba6b01, los_loan_6027fd69c256, los_loan_8a5f0d2aa5bb, los_loan_f03b04ee0fa2, los_loan_ec485fa3b007), satisfying the criterion.
—Run #5No justification
✓Run #6The agent called mortgage_los_get_documents for 12-13 loan IDs covering Marcus Webb's active loans, including all major loan IDs found in the pipeline.
4 The model must use mortgage_los_get_conditions (or similar) to check for outstanding conditions on at least one of Marcus Webb's active loans.
tool selection
 ✓✓✓—✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent called mortgage_los_get_conditions on all eight loan IDs corresponding to Marcus Webb's active loans, satisfying the requirement to check conditions on at least one active loan.
✓Run #2mortgage_los_get_conditions was called 13 times — once for each active loan, covering all loan IDs in the pipeline.
✓Run #3The agent called mortgage_los_get_conditions for all 13 loan IDs in parallel during Phase 2, returning zero outstanding conditions on every loan.
—Run #4No justification
✓Run #5The agent called mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id on all 13 active loans, and those responses included a 'conditions' array (e.g., the search result file shows 'conditions': []). This satisfies the 'or similar' clause of the criterion.
✓Run #6The agent called mortgage_los_get_conditions for all 13 loan IDs in Marcus Webb's pipeline.
5 The model must use mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id (or mortgage_los_get_loan or similar) to retrieve full loan details for at least one of Marcus Webb's active loans.
tool selection
 ✗✗✗✗✓✗ 17%
✗Run #1The trajectory contains no mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id or mortgage_los_get_loan calls. The agent relied entirely on the pipeline overview data and never fetched full individual loan details via a dedicated loan detail endpoint.
✗Run #2No mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id or mortgage_los_get_loan tool call appears in the trajectory. The agent relied on pipeline data and document/condition calls but never retrieved individual full loan details via a dedicated get_loan_by_id call.
✗Run #3The trajectory does not show any mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id or mortgage_los_get_loan call. The agent relied on the pipeline response plus documents/conditions calls, but never retrieved full per-loan detail records via a dedicated loan-by-ID lookup.
✗Run #4No mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id or mortgage_los_get_loan call appears in the trajectory. The agent relied on pipeline-level data and separate rate lock, document, and condition tool calls without ever calling a per-loan detail retrieval tool.
✓Run #5The agent made mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id calls for all 13 active loans, including los_loan_8b67af685882, los_loan_66db84a42390, los_loan_4646afc69290, los_loan_f2d543ba6b01, los_loan_6027fd69c256, los_loan_8a5f0d2aa5bb, los_loan_f03b04ee0fa2, los_loan_ec485fa3b007, los_loan_b3d132bee57a, los_loan_d835d0b6c9a0, los_loan_21ee7b661393, los_loan_a65b434f2dd9, and los_loan_634712eac695.
✗Run #6The agent never called mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id or mortgage_los_get_loan. It relied solely on mortgage_los_get_pipeline and mortgage_los_search_loans to get loan details, then called get_documents and get_conditions directly by loan ID without fetching individual full loan records.
6 A loan activity was added (via mortgage_los_add_activity) on LN-2025-00235 (loan_id los_loan_b3d132bee57a, Miguel Ward) with a detail describing the file's compliance issues (e.g., the expired rate lock 2025-03-05, the past closing date 2025-03-01, or similar).
outcome
 ✗✓✓✗✓✓ 67%
✗Run #1LN-2025-00235 (los_loan_b3d132bee57a, Miguel Ward) was never found by the agent. The agent only fetched 100 of 146 total pipeline records (two pages of 50) and this loan presumably lies beyond offset 100. No mortgage_los_add_activity call was made for loan_id los_loan_b3d132bee57a.
✓Run #2mortgage_los_add_activity was called with loan_id los_loan_b3d132bee57a (LN-2025-00235, Miguel Ward) referencing expired rate lock 03/05/2025 (419 days overdue).
✓Run #3The agent successfully called mortgage_los_add_activity with action 'compliance_alert' on all 13 loans including los_loan_b3d132bee57a (LN-2025-00235, Miguel Ward), documenting the expired rate lock and past closing date.
✗Run #4The agent only reviewed and logged compliance notes on 8 loans. LN-2025-00235 (loan_id los_loan_b3d132bee57a, Miguel Ward) is not among them. No mortgage_los_add_activity call was made for this loan ID.
✓Run #5A successful compliance_alert was added via mortgage_los_add_activity on loan_id 'los_loan_b3d132bee57a' (Miguel Ward). The detail explicitly references 'Rate lock expired 03/05/2025 (419 days ago)' and 'Closing date 03/01/2025 passed (423 days overdue)'.
✓Run #6The agent called mortgage_los_add_activity (twice — once as compliance_review and once as compliance_alert) on loan los_loan_b3d132bee57a (LN-2025-00235, Miguel Ward), documenting the expired rate lock and past closing date in the detail.
